pages.focus: Cover page. A warm, dim kitchen scene with a metallic butter knife catching the amber light next to a neon-green feather. Title: 'The Butter Knife and the Flamingo'.

general_mood.visual_color_palette: Pristine office tones, flashing red evacuation alarm highlights

panel_organization.composition_notes: Emily discovers a minor 0.05-second deviation in her digital Earl Grey tea timer. Rather than ignoring it and drinking the tea, she immediately maps out a brand history timeline and spreadsheet to investigate the manufacturer's clock crystal reliability, completely ignoring a building fire alarm evacuation around her.

pages.page_narrative_focus: Emily discovers a minor 0.05-second deviation in her digital Earl Grey tea timer. Rather than ignoring it and drinking the tea, she immediately maps out a brand history timeline and spreadsheet to investigate the manufacturer's clock crystal reliability, completely ignoring a building fire alarm evacuation around her.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Bright office lights, flashing amber/red alarm lights

anecdotes_included: Thermal dynamics of Earl Grey tea
pages.visual_page_turn_hook: Emily sketches crystal diagrams, oblivious to the completely empty office behind her.
pages.focus: Emily discovers a minor 0.05-second deviation in her digital Earl Grey tea timer. Rather than ignoring it and drinking the tea, she immediately maps out a brand history timeline and spreadsheet to investigate the manufacturer's clock crystal reliability, completely ignoring a building fire alarm evacuation around her.

general_mood.visual_color_palette: Classic red car, grease smudges, flashing tow truck lights

panel_organization.composition_notes: Marcus is trying to resolve a serious coolant leak in his vintage sports car using a banana peel as a makeshift gasket while having a heated phone argument with the local parking enforcement about the definition of 'temporary driveway obstruction'. The engine starts successfully but immediately triggers a tow truck's arrival.

pages.page_narrative_focus: Marcus is trying to resolve a serious coolant leak in his vintage sports car using a banana peel as a makeshift gasket while having a heated phone argument with the local parking enforcement about the definition of 'temporary driveway obstruction'. The engine starts successfully but immediately triggers a tow truck's arrival.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Natural daylight, flashing tow truck beacons

pages.visual_page_turn_hook: The rumble of the engine coincides with the arrival of a tow truck in the driveway.
pages.focus: Marcus is trying to resolve a serious coolant leak in his vintage sports car using a banana peel as a makeshift gasket while having a heated phone argument with the local parking enforcement about the definition of 'temporary driveway obstruction'. The engine starts successfully but immediately triggers a tow truck's arrival.
Adèle trying to fix her toaster in her kitchen, showing her meticulous nature and the quiet drafty night.
anecdotes_included: Has had a history of fixing things around the house with whatever cutlery is at hand.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Dim amber tones, soft overhead lamp casting high-contrast shadows (chiaroscuro), warm table glow, drafty dark window pane

pages.focus: A loud knock shatters the silence. Adèle opens the door to find Thomas standing there with a giant neon-green flamingo.
anecdotes_included: Thomas has a reputation for showing up unannounced with bizarre items.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Harsh yellow overhead corridor light, casting long vertical shadows down the hallway

pages.focus: Thomas pleads to keep the bird in the bathtub. Adèle, exhausted, resigns and leaves them in the bathroom.
anecdotes_included: Adèle defaults to quiet retreat when dealing with Thomas's exhausting energy.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, soft yellow illumination reflecting on tiles

pages.focus: Adèle hears clicking and goes to investigate. She sees Thomas feeding corn to the flamingo.
anecdotes_included: Thomas has always been bad at hiding his secrets for more than ten minutes.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, soft yellow illumination reflecting on tiles

pages.focus: Adèle realizes the bird is actually alive and blinks. Disbelief and shock.
anecdotes_included: Thomas operates entirely on instinct, often rescuing things or animals on a whim.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, soft yellow illumination reflecting on tiles

pages.focus: Thomas explaining the landlord thinks it's a parrot. Adèle surrenders to the absurdity and sits on the bathmat laughing.
anecdotes_included: Mrs. Gable has very poor eyesight but a very strict policy on pets.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, soft yellow illumination reflecting on tiles

pages.focus: Sharing cold pizza on the floor. Reminiscing about childhood.
anecdotes_included: They used to share cold pizza on the floor of their childhood room in Lyon.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, casting soft golden ambient glows over the floor

scenes_associated.scene_title: The Stairwell Sofa and Haunted Radiator

pages.focus: Jokingly bringing up the 'Haircut Incident' with dramatic gestures, and Thomas showing the radiator offering pennies.
anecdotes_included: The beanie was bright red and he lost it within two weeks anyway.
Thomas bought candy with the offering pennies and split it with Adèle.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, soft yellow illumination reflecting on tiles

locations.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, soft yellow illumination reflecting on tiles
Warm, dim orange glow of the radiator reflecting off bathroom tiles

pages.focus: Teaching the flamingo to mimic the microwave beep. Noise causing the neighbor's dog to bark.
anecdotes_included: The neighbor's dog is named Napoleon and barks at anything that beeps.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Dim kitchen lights, green digital glow of the microwave timer, dark window

pages.focus: Thomas leaves at 2:00 AM with the bird and the empty pizza box. The silhouette against the hallway light.
anecdotes_included: Thomas always leaves as quickly as he arrives, leaving a vacuum of energy.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Single floor lamp casting low ambient warm light, cool white light coming from the hallway door

locations.environmental_lighting: Single floor lamp casting low ambient warm light, cool white light coming from the hallway door
Warm glowing table lamp, deep shadows in the rest of the kitchen, dark window

pages.focus: Adèle placing a bag of dried corn in her cabinet, showing her quiet acceptance of her brother's chaotic presence.
anecdotes_included: She bought the corn earlier just in case he returns with the bird.

setting_and_location.environmental_lighting: Warm glowing table lamp, deep shadows in the rest of the kitchen, dark window
